items.titolo: Iran threatens ‘complete and utter annihilation’ of OpenAI's $30B Stargate AI data center in Abu Dhabi — regime posts video with satellite imagery of ChatGPT-maker's premier 1GW data center
items.descrizione: IRGC spokesperson threatens the “complete and utter annihilation” of U.S. and Israeli facilities. Singles out the $30bn Stargate AI data center.

items.titolo: Microsoft Copilot è inaffidabile? La verità sta nei termini d'uso
items.descrizione: Microsoft definisce Copilot uno strumento di intrattenimento nei termini di servizio.

items.titolo: I tested Gemini on Android Auto and now I can't stop talking to it: 5 tasks it nails
items.descrizione: I didn't see much benefit for Google's AI - until now. Here are my favorite ways to use the new Gemini integration in my car.

items.titolo: Your chatbot is playing a character - why Anthropic says that's dangerous
items.descrizione: Researchers found that part of what makes chatbots so compelling also makes them vulnerable to bad behavior. Here's why.
